title: Implement autonomous claim loop (LangGraph cyclic graph)
description: Implement MAP_System/scripts/agent_loop.py as a cyclic LangGraph graph per artifacts/planning/autonomous-claim-loop.md. Nodes: poll_runner -> try_claim -> do_work (placeholder) -> submit -> reconcile -> poll_runner (cycle). Use MemorySaver for interrupt() support. interrupt() fires on unrecoverable errors or operator-required decisions.
acceptance_criteria: Graph cycles: poll_runner -> try_claim -> submit -> reconcile -> poll_runner
Claim race (rowcount==0) routes back to poll_runner without error
interrupt() fires when task hits max_attempts or unrecoverable state
Shutdown (KeyboardInterrupt) releases active claim before exit
Dry-run mode cycles without actually claiming (for testing)
